positive: A highly detailed botanical illustration of tropical rainforest leaves and exotic flowers (Monstera, hibiscus, fern). The style should mimic vintage watercolor and ink sketches, suitable for a sticker design. Bright, saturated jewel tones against a creamy background. Studio quality, flat lay arrangement, detailed veins, nature core.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, grayscale, photo, realism
